name_cn:
『Burberry』
B's latest runway style 🌀 Structured palm leather shoulder bag 👝 paired with House check front cotton fabric 👜 Flip leather front 💫 paired with unique lock design and adjustable detachable strap 👍 Model No. 38996 👻 Multiple interior and exterior pockets 👸🏻 Exquisite hand-painted edges 👀 Dimensions 24:19:9 paired with polished metal accessories ❤ Perfectly showcasing superior quality
